calendar.matters:
Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re: Enforcement Of Subpoenas
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Thomas S. Lakritz, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3963, appearing for Petitioners.
Eric M. Safire, Esq., of Law Office of Eric Safire, Tel. 415.292.1940, appearing for Respondent Lynette Haynes.
Gerard J. Donnellan, Esq., of AT&T Legal Department, Tel. 415.778.1358, appearing for Respondent AT&T.

The matter was argued. After hearing, Petitioners City and County of San Francisco and Mayor Edwin M. Lee's Petition For Order To Show Cause Re: Enforcement of Subpoenas Issued By Mayor Edwin M. Lee is granted in part and denied in part. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re: Enforcement Of Subpoenas
Off Calendar May-01-2012 Continued To May-15-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Thomas S. Lakritz, DCA, from The Office of the City Attorney, 415-554-3963, for petitioner and moving party CCSF
Eric M. Safire, Esq., Law Offices, 415-292-1940, for respondent and opposing party Lynette P. Haynes
Gerard J. Donnellan, Esq., from AT&T Legal Department, 415-778-1358, for respondent AT&T Mobility LLP

Argued and the Court vacated its tentative ruling.
Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re: Enforcement Of Subpoenas is continued to 5/15/12 per agreement of parties. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976
